fomod.Name: Jackie Lives
fomod.Author: Antonia
fomod.Description: Brings Jackie Welles back to Night City after his Act 1 death, in a lore-friendly way, as a living scheduled NPC (not a default follower). Adds a retrieval questline, holocalls, proximity encounters, branching voiced dialogue, and an optional side-job companion. CET + Codeware + Audioware based; Jackie's real voice is added by the player (see the included HOW_TO_ADD_JACKIE_VOICES.txt), and the mod runs subtitle-only if audio is absent.
